title: Sshackl
compiled_truth: Sshackl is an external contact at [Swbell](companies/swbell). Over the corpus period (2000-03-22 to 2002-03-26), Sshackl sent 26 and received 184 emails, totalling 210 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (26).
